summary:
Claim: All types of wooden wedges (triangular, rectangular, and possibly round) are commonly available.
Evidence: - Triangular and rectangular wedges serve general purposes well; - Round wedges offer specific advantages such as smooth rolling motions without damaging surfaces.
Answer: D

Answer: D
